name: railkit
description: 🚂 Complete Node.js SDK for Indian Railways - Check PNR status, train schedules, live running status, seat availability, station information and more. Promise-based API with TypeScript support.
author: Rajiv Dubey

scripts.obfuscate: npx javascript-obfuscator index.js --output index.obfuscated.js --compact true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --rename-globals false --control-flow-flattening false --dead-code-injection false
